Game.Name: Super Momotarou Dentetsu DX (Japan) (JR Nishi-Nihon Presents)
Game.plot: Super Momotarou Dentetsu DX is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Make and published by Hudson,which was released in Japan in 1995.
Game.Notes: Super Momotarou Dentetsu DX is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Make and published by Hudson, which was released in Japan in 1995.
